problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion may resolve How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
